# Code & Documentation Review Loop

## Overview

This is a reusable review prompt for Ralph TUI loops. It performs a comprehensive code and documentation review pass and resolves any issues discovered.

## Scope

### Code Review
- Static analysis and linting
- Type correctness
- Logic errors and edge cases
- Security vulnerabilities
- Performance concerns
- Error handling completeness
- Test coverage and quality

### Documentation Review
- README accuracy and completeness
- API documentation (if... [truncated, 5700 chars total]
